original_image_tags: A typed memorandum on "HEADQUARTERS AIR MATERIEL COMMAND" letterhead. The paper shows signs of aging, with discoloration and two hole-punch marks on the left margin.
A blue and white stamp at the top right reads "DECLASSIFIED", with "Authority: NND 700188" in a box below.
A circular stamp to the right of the declassification stamp reads "SAVE PAPER" and "U.S. ARMY CONSERVATION".

elements.description: A rectangular 'DECLASSIFIED' stamp in the top right corner containing the text 'Authority: NND 700188'.
A circular 'SAVE' stamp in the top right corner.
Two large 'SECRET' stamps, one at the top center and one at the bottom center.

judge.reason: Description B fabricates two 'SECRET' stamps that are not present in Description A, creating a direct contradiction on the visual content of the page.
